iterations.label: Command Discovery
iterations.goal: Know how to build, run, and capture the game.

iterations.label: Clickable Expedition Skeleton
iterations.goal: Click through map -> ruins -> result -> camp -> map.

iterations.label: Camp Preparation
iterations.goal: Rest, craft, perk, talk, and route hint work without base-building.

iterations.label: First Region Mini-Loop
iterations.goal: 3-5 nodes form a 10-20 minute repeatable region loop.
